name: demo
description: Simulated multi-agent session — the gateway drug. No API key required.
author: Soul-Brews-Studio

cli.help:
maw demo — run a 90-second simulated multi-agent session (no API key required)

Spawns two mock agents in tmux panes, streams scripted output with realistic
pauses, then shows $0.00 cost. Requires an active tmux session.

Flags:
  --fast   Skip sleep delays (CI / screenshot mode)
  --help   Show this message
